prompt: Write tests for the `slugify` function in `slugify.js`. It has no existing test file — there is no sibling style to match, so pick a zero-dependency convention (Node's built-in `node:test` + `node:assert/strict` is fine, since this fixture has no test framework installed). Cover at minimum: a normal string, leading/trailing whitespace, mixed case, and an empty-string input.

rubric.description: a test file for slugify.js was created
test suite runs at least one test and all pass (guards against a trivial 0-tests-found exit 0)
